name: Cock-a-Leekie (Chicken & Leek Soup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat all ingredients except leeks to boiling in a Dutch oven.
2. Reduce heat and cover. Simmer for 30 minutes.
3. Add the leeks.
4. Return to a boil. Reduce heat and cover again.
5. Simmer until the thickest pieces of chicken are cooked through, about 15 minutes.
6. Remove the chicken from the broth and cool slightly.
7. Remove the chicken from the bones and skin, cutting it into 1-inch pieces.
8. Skim any fat that has risen to the surface.
9. Remove the bay leaf.
10. Add the chicken back to the broth.
11. Heat until hot, about 5 minutes.
